new_value: Filed 000-docs/026-AT-DSGN-repo-resolver-design.md. ADR defines RepoContext and ResolverError types, 6-step resolution procedure (single consolidated git rev-parse call), monorepo detection precedence (pnpm/npm-yarn/nx/turbo/lerna), 4-tier tenantId derivation (env → config → normalized remote URL → basename) with credential stripping, 5-min TTL process-local cache, failure-mode table, security considerations, and fixture-based testing strategy. Index updated with 025/026 entries and next sequence bumped to 027. pnpm format:check clean.
{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-mbd.2","title":"repo-resolver: implement resolveRepoContext() core API","description":"Implement resolveRepoContext(cwd: string): Promise\u003cResult\u003cRepoContext, ResolverError\u003e\u003e returning {repoRoot, repoName, remoteUrl, branch, commitSha, isMonorepo, workspaceRoot, workspacePackage}. Use git shellouts via child_process; handle detached HEAD, no-remote, and non-git cwd gracefully. Use Result\u003cT,E\u003e from common package.","acceptance_criteria":"Exports resolveRepoContext; unit tests cover plain repo, detached HEAD, no-remote, non-git cwd; returns typed Result","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:14Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:14Z"}

new_value: Implemented resolveRepoContext(cwd) in packages/repo-resolver. Returns Result<RepoContext, ResolverError> via common's Result type. Core resolver covers plain repo, no-remote, detached HEAD, bare repo (via rev-parse --absolute-git-dir fallback), no-commits, non-git cwd, and missing path. Single consolidated git rev-parse --show-toplevel --is-bare-repository HEAD probe for the hot path; remote+branch fetched in parallel. realpath canonicalization on cwd. 8/8 package tests pass, 1008/1008 full suite pass under pnpm validate. Monorepo fields default to non-monorepo — to be populated by bead mbd.3.
{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-mbd.4","title":"repo-resolver: tenant ID derivation strategy","description":"Implement deriveTenantId(ctx: RepoContext, override?: TenantOverrides): string. Precedence: (1) explicit TEAMKB_TENANT_ID env override, (2) .teamkb/config.json in repoRoot or workspaceRoot, (3) normalized remote URL (strip protocol/auth/.git suffix, lowercase), (4) repoRoot basename fallback. Document precedence in design doc.","acceptance_criteria":"Unit tests cover all 4 precedence tiers; normalization handles ssh/https/git+ssh URL forms","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:20Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:20Z"}

new_value: Implemented deriveTenantId(ctx, overrides?) and normalizeRemoteUrl() in packages/repo-resolver/src/tenant.ts. 4-tier precedence: explicit override → env var (configurable name, default TEAMKB_TENANT_ID) → .teamkb/config.json tenantId in workspaceRoot ?? repoRoot → normalized remote URL → repo basename. Remote URL normalization strips protocol, user-info credentials, converts scp-style host:path → host/path, preserves explicit ports, strips .git, lowercases. Config reader has 64KB size cap and silently falls through on malformed JSON / missing field / non-string value. Empty/whitespace explicit and env values fall through (don't block downstream). 20 unit tests covering all precedence tiers, all URL forms, credential stripping, malformed config handling, port preservation. Full suite 1028/1028 pass.
{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-mbd.3","title":"repo-resolver: monorepo detection","description":"Walk up from cwd detecting monorepo root and which workspace package contains cwd. Support: pnpm-workspace.yaml, package.json workspaces (npm/yarn), nx.json, turbo.json, lerna.json. Return {isMonorepo, workspaceRoot, workspacePackage}.","acceptance_criteria":"Fixture tests for each monorepo tool type pass; correct workspacePackage identified when cwd is inside a workspace subdir","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:17Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:17Z"}

new_value: Implemented detectMonorepo(cwd, repoRoot) in packages/repo-resolver/src/monorepo.ts. Walks upward from cwd to repoRoot probing for workspace manifests in documented precedence order: pnpm-workspace.yaml → package.json with workspaces field (array or {packages:[]}) → nx.json → turbo.json → lerna.json. workspacePackage derived by walking from cwd back toward workspaceRoot looking for the nearest package.json with a non-empty name field; null when cwd === workspaceRoot or no named package.json exists between. Wired into resolveRepoContext via spread (...monorepo) so RepoContext.isMonorepo/workspaceRoot/workspacePackage now populate. 64KB manifest size cap defends against pathological files. relative-path containment check (isWithin) defends against /repo-foo vs /repo-foo-bar prefix-match bug. 16 monorepo unit tests + 2 resolver-level integration tests using new pnpm-workspace fixture. Full suite 1026/1026 pass under pnpm validate.
{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-mbd.5","title":"repo-resolver: process-local cache","description":"Cache resolved RepoContext by resolved repoRoot to avoid repeated git shellouts. Cache is per-process, time-bounded (5 min default, configurable). Expose clearCache() for tests. Cache key: realpath(cwd) → repoRoot mapping, then repoRoot → RepoContext.","acceptance_criteria":"Repeated resolveRepoContext() calls on same cwd hit cache; clearCache() resets; TTL expires entries","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:24Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:24Z"}

new_value: Implemented RepoContextCache class + module-level default singleton in packages/repo-resolver/src/cache.ts. Two-level lookup: realpath(cwd) → repoRoot → {context, fetchedAt}. Repeated resolutions from any subdir of the same repo share a single entry. 5-minute default TTL, configurable via setCacheTtl() or per-instance ttlMs option. Stale entries evicted on access (not background eviction). resolveRepoContext now accepts {cache?: RepoContextCache | null} option: undefined uses default singleton, null disables caching, instance lets advanced callers/tests inject their own. clearCache(), getDefaultCache(), setCacheTtl(), setDefaultCache() exposed for tests and explicit invalidation. Errors not cached (only successful resolutions). 20/20 tests including TTL bounds, cwd index sharing, null cache bypass, error non-caching, expiry refresh, clear() reset. Full suite 1020/1020 pass.
{"status":"in_progress"}

old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-1x6.2","title":"edge-daemon: CLI subcommands (start/stop/status/run-once)","description":"main.ts currently auto-starts with no argv parsing. Add subcommand dispatch: 'start' (current behavior), 'stop' (send SIGTERM to PID in lock file), 'status' (read lock + last-cycle state, print JSON), 'run-once' (single cycle, exit 0). Use minimal argv parsing — no extra deps.","acceptance_criteria":"pnpm --filter edge-daemon exec tsx src/main.ts \u003csubcommand\u003e works for all four; exit codes correct","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:39Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T01:39:39Z"}

new_value: PR #42 merged (commit 74587aa). New apps/edge-daemon/src/cli.ts dispatches start/stop/status/run-once via process.argv slice — no added deps. Decisions: default subcommand=start, stop exits 0 on stale-lock cleanup, status always exits 0 with structured JSON, run-once skips lock acquisition (one-shot semantics). Tests: 84/84 edge-daemon, 1071/1071 monorepo, validate green.

PR #43 merged (commit 5640c4a). DefaultContextProvider in packages/claude-runtime/src/capture/context-provider.ts now calls resolveRepoContext() first; on success maps RepoContext → GitContext (repoName, commitSha, tenantId via deriveTenantId); on any error falls back to legacy resolveGitContext() — non-git cwd preserved. Extended GitContext with optional repoName/commitSha. candidate-builder defaults projectContext from gitContext.repoName when capture event lacks explicit value. Tests: 96/96 claude-runtime, 58/58 repo-resolver, full validate green in CI.

PR #45 merged (6070ab3). New PinoDaemonLogger in apps/edge-daemon/src/pino-logger.ts implements DaemonLogger via pino with JSON output (DAEMON_LOG_PRETTY=1 enables pretty for dev). main.ts now seeds a child logger bound with {tenantId} so all runtime lines carry the field. Existing ConsoleDaemonLogger + NullLogger preserved as alternatives. 5 new tests + 16 pre-existing pass.

PR #46 merged (07d96f6). Shipped 5 deploy artifacts under apps/edge-daemon/deploy/ (systemd unit, launchd plist, multi-stage Dockerfile, .dockerignore, README) + ops runbook 000-docs/027-OD-OPSM-edge-daemon-runbook.md (reusing existing OD-OPSM code from doc 016). 000-INDEX.md updated. Plist parsed clean. Followup d428cf6: prettier format on the 3 markdown files (CI fix).
all steps complete

PR #48 merged (5cd13e3). Added 3 fixture builders (makeNxWorkspace, makeRepoWithSubmodule, makeRepoWithWorktree) extending existing 6 in packages/repo-resolver/src/__tests__/fixtures.ts. New fixture-cases.test.ts covers all 9 fixtures with 18 assertions. 71 tests pass in 2.5s (<<10s budget). No bugs found in resolver — all 9 cases handled correctly.

PR #49 merged (d60a68c). Added apps/edge-daemon/src/health-server.ts (HealthServer via node:http, no Fastify). /healthz returns 200 running / 503 stopping; /last-cycle returns latest CycleResult JSON or 404. Port via DAEMON_HEALTH_PORT (default 0=disabled). Fire-and-forget start from EdgeDaemon to preserve sync start() contract. 11 new tests pass.

PR #50 merged (2f06de0). Feature-flagged DAEMON_SCOPE_BY_REPO=true enables filtering spool candidates by MemoryCandidate.metadata.repoUrl (normalized strip-.git + lowercase) matching resolver's RepoContext.remoteUrl. New apps/edge-daemon/src/repo-scope.ts with filterByRepoScope helper. Graceful degradation when resolver errors (logs warning, bypasses filter for cycle). 7 repo-scope tests + 11 config tests pass. Merge resolution kept all 3 prior features (scopeByRepo + healthPort + retry config) coexisting.
all steps complete

PR #47 merged (7d42799). apps/edge-daemon/src/retry.ts with classifyError + withRetry; cycle.ts steps 3/4 wrapped. DaemonConfig gets maxRetries/retryBaseDelayMs/retryMaxJitterMs/sleepFn. Full-jitter backoff. 16 retry + 3 cycle tests.

old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-y6i","title":"Restore Gemini review prompt + MCP server stripped by PR #34","description":"PR #34 ('join wild ecosystem shared GCP project', commit 1144c94) reduced .github/workflows/gemini-review.yml from the working template (with prompt + github MCP server config) to a 54-line stub that authenticates to GCP but has no prompt to execute. Fix: update section to document /healthz (200 ok / 503 stopping) and /last-cycle (JSON CycleResult / 404 no cycle yet) with DAEMON_HEALTH_PORT env var, and remove the contradiction.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T06:21:58Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T06:21:58Z"}

new_value: {"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-6bk","title":"fix(edge-daemon): health server fire-and-forget start leaks http.Server if stop() called during startup","description":"EdgeDaemon.start() calls HealthServer.start() without awaiting. If daemon.stop() fires before HealthServer.start() resolves (signal during startup, or fast test teardown), _server is still null inside HealthServer — stop() returns immediately. When start() later resolves, _server is set and the underlying http.Server runs forever with no one to close it. Fix: track the in-flight start Promise on EdgeDaemon and await it inside stop() before calling _healthServer.stop(), or refactor to make the start/stop lifecycle synchronizable.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T06:21:59Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T06:21:59Z"}

new_value: PR #59 merged. Restored prompt: '/gemini-review' + mcpServers.github config + env block + concurrency. Subsequent PRs will now receive actual Gemini reviews.

PR #60 merged. pino-pretty moved from devDependencies to dependencies so pnpm deploy --prod no longer prunes it. DAEMON_LOG_PRETTY=1 now safe in production. Gemini review: 'clean, well-scoped bug fix'.

PR #61 merged. Runbook Health Check section now documents /healthz + /last-cycle with response-code table, curl example, DAEMON_HEALTH_PORT setup, and 127.0.0.1 bind caveat (pointer to dwe). Gemini approved + addressed nit on backtick formatting.

PR #62 merged. EdgeDaemon tracks _healthServerStartPromise and stop() awaits it before calling _healthServer.stop(), preventing http.Server leak when stop() is called during startup. 5 race tests in daemon-lifecycle.test.ts pass. Gemini approved + addressed 2 green nits (arrow shorthand in .then, async rm in afterEach).

new_value: PR #67 merged. Systemd unit overrides DAEMON_SPOOL_DIR + DAEMON_EXPORT_DIR + DAEMON_PID_FILE to /var/lib/edge-daemon/* so defaults work with ProtectHome=true. Gemini approved + addressed nit (comment listing). Also dropped accidental worktree-submodule entries.

PR #68 merged. Extracted appendOptionalFilters() helper in memory-repository.ts; FTS5 + LIKE search paths now share tenant/category filter construction while keeping query structure separate. Net −12 lines. 86 store tests pass. Gemini suggested widening param type to any — declined (regression vs quality-5 sweep); widen to union when a non-string caller actually appears.

PR #69 merged (d9aecf5). Added DAEMON_HEALTH_HOST env (default 127.0.0.1). health-server.ts accepts host in constructor; daemon.ts passes config.healthHost; Dockerfile sets ENV=0.0.0.0 + EXPOSE 9100; runbook documents 127.0.0.1 vs 0.0.0.0 tradeoff with k8s livenessProbe examples. 16 config tests + 14 health-server tests pass. Gemini approved + applied 🟢 nit (concise parseNonEmptyString).

{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"qmd-team-intent-kb-0s1","title":"refactor(store): eliminate ~40 SQLite deserialize type casts via Zod-on-read or generated row mappers","description":"In packages/store/src/repositories/*, better-sqlite3's .get()/.all() return unknown. The current pattern uses 'as \u003cT\u003e' casts on JSON.parse(row.data) plus field-by-field casting. This is a soft form of type-lying — if a DB row is malformed, the cast silently widens to the domain type and bugs surface far from the source. Options: (a) Zod .parse() on every read (performance impact on hot paths), (b) codegen row-to-domain mappers from schema, (c) selective Zod on untrusted/rare reads only. Investigate cost/benefit, pick one. Finding from PR #57.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T07:53:56Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T07:53:56Z"}

Resolver has a TTL cache (PR #38) — pass {cache: explicit} or resolve once at daemon start and memoize, rather than relying on the default cache implicitly.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremylongshore@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-15T06:22:03Z","created_by":"jeremylongshore","updated_at":"2026-04-15T06:22:03Z"}

Implemented in apps/reporting/src/aggregators/knowledge-health-aggregator.ts producing freshness/coverage/quality metrics suitable for dashboard ingestion. Tests: knowledge-health-aggregator.test.ts — passing.

Implemented in packages/policy-engine — 8 deterministic rules (secret-detection, content-length, source-trust, relevance-score, dedup-check, tenant-match, sensitivity-gate, content-sanitization) composed via PolicyPipeline with short-circuit on first fail. Tests: pipeline.test.ts + per-rule test files — all passing. This is the governance engine for memory promotion policy.

Trust boundary enforced via TrustLevel enum (schema/enums.ts) + source-trust-rule (policy-engine) + MCP server tools tag proposals with trustLevel=medium (propose.ts:40, import.ts:95). Policy pipeline gates curation based on source trust. Per-tool fine-grained trust boundaries deferred to enterprise follow-up.

Deferred to enterprise follow-up (not a v1.0 blocker). Current platform supports per-tenant governance policies via GovernancePolicy schema + store.PolicyRepository + api /api/policies routes. Enterprise managed-settings layer (centralized org policy push) tracked as separate P3 bead.

new_value: Shipped OpenAPI 3.1 spec at /openapi.json and Swagger UI at /docs via @fastify/swagger + @fastify/swagger-ui. All routes declare tags/summary/description; handler logic untouched. Route registration wrapped in inner app.register() so the onRoute hook fires for all routes. Auth middleware exempts /openapi.json and /docs/*. New test apps/api/src/__tests__/openapi.test.ts asserts 3.1.0 spec with /api/candidates + /api/memories paths. pnpm validate: 111 files, 1164 tests passing. PR https://github.com/jeremylongshore/qmd-team-intent-kb/pull/84 branch feat/apps-api-openapi-spec-bzfwp commit 738a9da.

Merged via PR #83 (commit on main). publishConfig.access=public added to schema/common/repo-resolver + minimal READMEs. policy-engine held private due to claude-runtime dep (documented follow-up). 029-OD-RELS-npm-publishing-strategy.md lays out full workflow. Gemini follow-up fixed shell brace-expansion example. Validate green 1162/1162.

Merged via PR #84. OpenAPI 3.1 spec generated at /openapi.json + Swagger UI at /docs via @fastify/swagger + @fastify/swagger-ui. Routes declare tags/summary/description; spec+docs exempt from API-key auth. Test apps/api/src/__tests__/openapi.test.ts asserts spec shape. Validate green 1164/1164. Gemini comment (dynamic version from package.json) noted as low-priority follow-up.

Merged via PR #82. Cosign keyless signing + SLSA Level 3 provenance added to release.yml — edge-daemon image built + pushed to ghcr.io on tag pushes, signed via OIDC keyless (Rekor), SLSA provenance via slsa-github-generator v2.0.0 reusable workflow. Per-job permissions (id-token/packages/attestations), scoped to tag push only. Full operator doc at 000-docs/028-OD-SECU-release-signing.md.
